models.label: DeepSeek V4 Flash
models.notes: Fast DeepSeek API route. DeepSeek API accepts thinking on/off and high/max effort; low/medium are compatibility aliases to high.

models.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro
models.notes: Stronger DeepSeek API route. DeepSeek API accepts thinking on/off and high/max effort; low/medium are compatibility aliases to high.

profiles.label: Fast
profiles.description: Quick chat and light utility work.

profiles.label: GPT High
profiles.description: Slower, better for debugging and analysis.

profiles.label: GPT XHigh
profiles.description: Heavier reasoning for rare difficult turns.

profiles.label: DS Flash High
profiles.description: Fast DeepSeek helper mode with official default thinking effort.

profiles.label: DS Pro High
profiles.description: DeepSeek Pro helper mode with official default thinking effort.

profiles.label: DS Flash Off
profiles.description: DeepSeek Flash with thinking disabled for quick text-only turns.

profiles.label: DS Flash Max
profiles.description: DeepSeek Flash with maximum thinking effort.

profiles.label: DS Pro Max
profiles.description: DeepSeek Pro with maximum thinking effort.
